narration_text: Now we'll see how packet switching and circuit switching impact network usage. Let's think about this together, considering a 1 Gb/s link where each user requires 100 Mb/s when active, which is only about 10% of the time. Look at the diagrams on your slide, notice how the links are utilized under both switching methods. Observe the difference in resource allocation, and think about how this affects the number of users that can be supported. As you examine these visuals, consider the efficiency of packet switching in handling multiple users. This comparison is crucial, and it will help us understand the benefits of packet switching, which we'll explore further in the next section.
